response.justification: Bogdan has deep and diverse engineering experience spanning 25+ years with strong technical craftsmanship, open-source contributions, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy, or director-level influence in AI-driven innovation — key requirements for this role.
strengths: 25+ years of hands-on software engineering across stacks and domains
Demonstrated open-source AI-agent and infrastructure contributions (MCP, GISCollective)
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor through workshops and tools
concerns: No clear evidence of AI/ML product development or cloud platform strategy experience
Lacks advanced degree in AI or documented research/publications in AI
No indication of strategic customer advisory or enterprise AI transformation leadership
